title: Meeting Invitation Writer
scenario: Write a meeting invitation email for a team meeting. The email should include the meeting title, date, time, and location. The email should be formatted as a standard business email.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the email meets the constraints of including the recipient's name and being under 150 words.
Check if the email includes the correct meeting information (title, date, time, location).
Check if the email is formatted as a standard business email.
